title: eurylepis fragrans
intro: Eurylepis fragrans, also known as Indian spikenard or valerian, is a plant species native to the Himalayas. It is a type of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae, known for its sweet fragrance and medicinal properties. The roots of Eurylepis fragrans have been used in traditional medicine to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, and have also been shown to have sedative and anti-inflammatory effects, providing health benefits such as improved sleep quality and reduced stress levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it a popular natural remedy for promoting relaxation and overall well-being.
